$comment: Source manifest for the Noor SQLite build. sha256 values are filled in by scripts/build-db.ts at build time and emitted to data/manifest.json.

tanzil_uthmani.note: txt-2 is the simple `surah|ayah|text` format, one ayah per line.

tanzil_simple_indopak.note: Phase 1a placeholder for Indo-Pak orthography (Tanzil simple-clean is diacritic-stripped, not true Indo-Pak script). Phase 1b should swap in a true Indo-Pak Mushaf source.

quran_com_chapters.note: 114 surahs metadata (name_arabic, name_simple, revelation_place, verses_count, pages).

quran_com_verse_metadata.note: Called once per surah (114 calls). Provides page_no/juz_no/hizb_no/ruku_no/manzil_no/sajdah_flag for every ayah. Cached per-surah.

trans_kanzuliman_urdu.attribution: Ahmad Raza Khan (Kanzul Iman, d. 1921). Sourced via Tanzil.net.
trans_kanzuliman_urdu.note: Tanzil's `/trans/<key>` returns the full translation in `surah|ayah|text` text format. As of 2026 QuranEnc no longer publishes urdu_raza/urdu_maududi -- Tanzil is the only stable source.

trans_maududi_urdu.license: Free non-commercial digital distribution (CC-BY-3.0 via Tanzil)
trans_maududi_urdu.attribution: Sayyid Abul A'la Maududi (Tafhim-ul-Quran). Sourced via Tanzil.net.
trans_maududi_urdu.note: Single fetch, full translation in `surah|ayah|text` format.

trans_sahih_english.license: Free non-commercial digital distribution with attribution (CC-BY-3.0 via Tanzil)
trans_sahih_english.attribution: Saheeh International (1997). Sourced via Tanzil.net / Al-Muntada Al-Islami.
trans_sahih_english.note: Single fetch, full translation in `surah|ayah|text` format.

font_kfgqpc_indopak.license: Free for Quranic display use with attribution
font_kfgqpc_indopak.attribution: King Fahd Glorious Quran Printing Complex
font_kfgqpc_indopak.note: GAP (Phase 1b, Plan B per ADR-0009): KFGQPC IndoPak is not fetchable from any public mirror as of 2026-05. The previously-pinned URL returns 404 and no public CDN, GitHub repo, or KFGQPC origin host serves the file. Scheherazade New is shipped as the primary Arabic font; KFGQPC is deferred to v1.1 as a user-downloadable on first launch (one-time accept + 4 MB download) once a licensed mirror is identified.

font_scheherazade_new.note: Primary Arabic font for Phase 1b (Plan B per ADR-0009 since KFGQPC IndoPak is unavailable). The zip contains ScheherazadeNew-Regular.ttf and bold/italic siblings; only Regular is bundled.

audio_bundle_alafasy.$comment: Surah Al-Fatihah Alafasy MP3s bundled into the app for fully-offline first-run audio (~150 KB total). URL pattern: <base><surah_3digit><ayah_3digit>.mp3
audio_bundle_alafasy.license: Public CDN; reciter is Mishary Rashid Alafasy. Audio files distributed by everyayah.com.
